data.body:
VALIDATION TUNING (round 5 gold set) — actions for this story's criteria implementation:
- E5 testing-plan completeness OVER-FIRES (9/12 false-fire on real DSO plans; confirms round 4). Apply type-aware
  suppression (RED/GREEN test tasks; the task IS the test) + raise its bar; the change-detector roll-in may have
  over-tightened it. Re-measure recall+precision after.
- T3 integration-feasibility must run on the AGENT tier (it correctly hedges AMBIGUOUS single-turn — can't verify an
  API exists without tools). Same for the codebase-grounded set (G6/G1G2/E4/A1/T9/COH/T10/T11): route AGENT so
  AMBIGUOUS-on-clean resolves to a concrete verdict.
- Recall is strong (13/15 seeded defects caught, zero rubber-stamping); the new criteria don't false-FAIL on real
  plans. Lift each criterion's prose (a)/(b)/(c) binary sub-checks into the structured checklist[] field.
